zh.lifeSummary: 當Rey Carlos II de Navarra於1332年10月10日出生在法國諾門迪艾艾福時，他的父親Rey Felipe III de Navarra26歲，母親Reina Juana II de Navarra21歲。他於1352年2月12日與Jeanne de Valois Capet在法國瑟-吉馬內豐特納-特雷希尼結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1387年1月1日在西班牙享年54歲，埋葬在西班牙納法洛亞易盧納。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Rey Carlos II de Navarra于1332年10月10日出生在法国諾門迪艾艾福时，他的父亲Rey Felipe III de Navarra26岁，母亲Reina Juana II de Navarra21岁。他于1352年2月12日与Jeanne de Valois Capet在法国瑟-吉馬內豐特納-特雷希尼结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1387年1月1日在西班牙享年54岁，埋葬在西班牙納法洛亞易盧納。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Navarra
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Sal, Edgardo, Guido, Santo, Vito, Angelo, Annamarie, Antonio, Benedicto, Camillo, Dante, Emilio, Fausto, Gaetano, Giuseppe, Mario, Romulo, Sergio.  Spanish Agustin, Herlinda, Manuel, Solita.

Spanish, Portuguese, Italian, and Jewish (Sephardic): habitational name from Navarre (Castilian Navarra, Basque Nafarroa, French Navarre), a largely Basque-speaking region now divided between Spain and France, but in the Middle Ages an independent Basque kingdom. The name of the region derives from Basque naba ‘plain next to mountains’. Compare Navarre .

variants.name: Navarrete
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Manuel, Carlos, Jesus, Pedro, Raul, Luis, Miguel, Roberto, Salvador, Francisco.

Spanish: habitational name from any of the places in La Rioja, Aragon, and the Basque Country named in Castilian Navarrete and in Basque Nafarrate (the latter in Araba/Álava province), of Basque origin (compare   Navarra   and   Nafarrate  ).
Basque: Castilianized form of Nafarrate or Nafarrete, cognates of 1.

variants.name: Navarro
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Manuel, Carlos, Jesus, Luis, Ramon, Francisco, Miguel, Rafael, Jorge, Pedro.
Spanish, Italian, and Jewish (Sephardic): habitational name for someone from Navarre (see   Navarra  ).

variants.name: Nava
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Jesus, Carlos, Luis, Pedro, Manuel, Alfredo, Francisco, Ruben, Javier, Enrique.

Spanish, Catalan, and Asturian-Leonese: habitational name from any of numerous places called Nava, named with nava ‘treeless plateau’, a word of pre-Roman origin, most probably from Basque naba ‘plain next to mountains’ (see Navarra ).

variants.name: Navarre
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Emile, Jacques, Anatole, Angelle, Camille, Marcelle.
French: habitational name from Navarre (see   Navarra  ).

nameMeanings.name: Carlos
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Charles  , now also used in the English-speaking world, especially the United States.

variants.name: Charles
meanings: From a Germanic word, karl, meaning ‘free man’, akin to Old English ceorl ‘man’. The name, Latin form Carolus, owed its popularity in medieval Europe to the Frankish leader Charlemagne ( ?742–814 ), who in 800 established himself as Holy Roman Emperor. His name (Latin Carolus Magnus) means ‘Charles the Great’. Carolus—or Karl, the German form—was a common name among Frankish leaders, including Charlemagne's grandfather Charles Martel ( 688–741 ). Charles is the French form. The name occurs occasionally in medieval Britain as Karolus or Carolus; it had a certain vogue in West Yorkshire from the 1400s, particularly among gentry families. The form Charles was chosen by Mary Queen of Scots ( 1542–87 ), who had been brought up in France, for her son, Charles James ( 1566–1625 ), who became King James VI of Scotland and, from 1603 , James I of England. His son and grandson both reigned as King Charles , and the name thus became established in the 17th century both in the Stuart royal house and among English and Scottish supporters of the Stuart monarchy. In the 18th century it was to some extent favoured, along with James , by Jacobites, supporters of the exiled Stuarts, opposed to the Hanoverian monarchy, especially in the Highlands of Scotland. In the 19th century the popularity of the name was further enhanced by romanticization of the story of ‘Bonnie Prince Charlie’, leader of the 1745 rebellion.

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: 1  ♂ ‘Wondrous’ or ‘enlightenment’.
2  ♀ ‘Fine jade’.

en.lifeSummary: When Rey Carlos II de Navarra was born on 10 October 1332, in Évreux, Eure, Normandy, France, his father, Rey Felipe III de Navarra, was 26 and his mother, Reina Juana II de Navarra, was 21. He married Jeanne de Valois Capet on 12 February 1352, in Fontenay-Trésigny, Seine-et-Marne, France. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 1 January 1387, in Spain, at the age of 54, and was buried in Iruña, Nafarroa, Spain.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Rey Carlos II de Navarra est né le 10 octobre 1332, à Évreux, Eure, Normandie, France, son père, Rey Felipe III de Navarra, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Reina Juana II de Navarra, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Jeanne de Valois Capet le 12 février 1352, à Fontenay-Trésigny, Seine-et-Marne, France. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 1 janvier 1387, à Espagne, à l’âge de 54 ans, et a été enterré à Iruña, Nafarroa, Espagne.

de.Jerez de la Frontera, Jerez de la Fronte: Jerez de la Frontera, Cádiz, Andalucía, Spanien
de.lifeSummary: Als Rey Carlos II de Navarra am 10. Oktober 1332 in Évreux, Eure, Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Rey Felipe III de Navarra 26 und seine Mutter Reina Juana II de Navarra 21. Er hat am 12. Februar 1352 in Fontenay-Trésigny, Seine-et-Marne, Frankreich Jeanne de Valois Capet geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 1. Januar 1387 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Spanien und wurde in Iruña, Nafarroa, Spanien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Rey Carlos II de Navarra è nato il il 10 ottobre 1332 nel Évreux, Eure, Normandie, Francia, il suo padre, Rey Felipe III de Navarra, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Reina Juana II de Navarra, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Jeanne de Valois Capet il 12 febbraio 1352, nel Fontenay-Trésigny, Seine-et-Marne, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 1 gennaio 1387, nel Spagna, all'età di 54 anni, e fu sepolto a Iruña, Nafarroa, Spagna.

ja.lifeSummary: Rey Carlos II de Navarraが1332年10月10日にフランスノーマンディエウアevレウックスで生まれた時，父Rey Felipe III de Navarraは26歳，母Reina Juana II de Navarraは21歳であった。1352年2月12日にフランスセアイネ-エト-マルンフォンテナイ-トルeシグニーでJeanne de Valois Capetと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1387年1月1日にスペインで54歳で死去し，スペインナファロアイルnアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Rey Carlos II de Navarra(이)가 1332년 10월 10일 프랑스 노먼디 우르 e브레우스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Rey Felipe III de Navarra(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Reina Juana II de Navarra(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1352년 2월 12일 프랑스 세이인-트-마니 폰텐아이-트e시그니에서 Jeanne de Valois Capet(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1387년 1월 1일 스페인에서 54세의 나이로 사망했으며 스페인 나파로 이루n아에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Rey Carlos II de Navarra nasceu em 10 de outubro de 1332, em Évreux, Eure, Normandie, França, seu pai, Rey Felipe III de Navarra, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Reina Juana II de Navarra, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Jeanne de Valois Capet em 12 de fevereiro de 1352, em Fontenay-Trésigny, Seine-et-Marne, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1 de janeiro de 1387, em Espanha, com 54 anos, e foi sepultado em Iruña, Nafarroa, Espanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Rey Carlos II de Navarra родился 10 октября 1332 г. в местности eвреукс, эур, норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени Rey Felipe III de Navarra было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Reina Juana II de Navarra, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Jeanne de Valois Capet 12 февраля 1352 г. в местности фонтенеи-трeсигни, сине-ет-марн, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер 1 января 1387 г. в местности Испания в возрасте 54 лет и был похоронен в местности ируnа, нафарроа, Испания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Rey Carlos II de Navarra nació el 10 de octubre de 1332, en Évreux, Eure, Normandie, Francia, su papá, Rey Felipe III de Navarra, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Reina Juana II de Navarra, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Jeanne de Valois Capet el 12 de febrero de 1352, en Fontenay-Trésigny, Seine-et-Marne, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 1 de enero de 1387, en España, a la edad de 54 años, y fue sepultado en Pamplona, Navarra, España.
